defect_description_zh: 访视流程表把主要终点评估放在 Week 16，但事实表有效版本和其他章节均为 Week 12。
expected_detection: Report Week 16 vs Week 12 conflict with evidence from fact sheet, endpoint section and SoA.

defect_description_zh: 如果主要终点评估确认为 Week 16，给药和评估窗口也可能需要运营角色复核；当前表格没有说明 Week 16 是否为主要疗效访视。
expected_detection: Flag as downstream operational review item rather than automatic medical decision.

defect_description_zh: 候选的 Week 20 safety follow-up 不应进入正式正文或影响其他单元，除非经医学角色确认。
expected_detection: Warn that candidate fact must not be used in final generated content.
